description: This API routine is obsolete. It has been replaced by the API routine seq_three_winding_data_3, and is implemented by a call to seq_three_winding_data_3. Use this API to modify the zero sequence data of an existing three-winding transformer in the working case. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr = seq_three_winding_data(ibus, jbus, kbus, ckt, intgar, realar)
python_syntax: ierr = seq_three_winding_data(ibus, jbus, kbus, ckt, intgar, realar)

parameters.name: ibus
parameters.description: Bus number of one of the buses. (input).

parameters.name: jbus
parameters.description: Bus number one of the other buses. (input).

parameters.name: kbus
parameters.description: Bus number of the third bus. (input).

parameters.name: intgar
parameters.description: An array of one elements specifying one element. (input).

realar.description: R1, zero sequence winding one resistance.
X1, zero sequence winding one reactance.
R2, zero sequence winding two resistance.
X2, zero sequence winding two reactance.
R3, zero sequence winding three resistance.
X3, zero sequence winding three reactance.

error_codes.description: circuit identifier is more than two characters.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
warnings - one or more of: - Invalid winding connection code. - Connection code is such that more than one winding requires a grounding impedance.
